evals.prompt: I have a ball the player rolls with WASD. When keys are released the ball should stop quickly. Write a BallController component for Needle Engine.
evals.expected_output: Uses applyImpulse (not applyForce) for movement, uses getVelocity/setVelocity to brake on release (not _body internal access)

assertions.text: Uses applyImpulse for movement input, not applyForce
Uses rb.getVelocity() and rb.setVelocity() for braking, not (rb as any)._body
Uses SphereCollider for the ball, not BoxCollider

evals.prompt: Add bloom and vignette post-processing to my Needle Engine scene from code, and let me toggle bloom on/off at runtime.
evals.expected_output: Uses this.context.postprocessing.addEffect(), not Volume component. Uses .enabled to toggle, not .active

assertions.text: Uses this.context.postprocessing.addEffect() as the primary API
Does not create a Volume component to add effects
Uses bloom.enabled = false to toggle, not bloom.active

evals.prompt: I need physics for a bowling game in Needle Engine — pins are cylinder-shaped, ball is a sphere. Set up the colliders and rigidbodies from code.
evals.expected_output: Uses SphereCollider for ball, CapsuleCollider for pins, not BoxCollider for everything

assertions.text: Uses SphereCollider for the bowling ball
Uses CapsuleCollider for the bowling pins, not BoxCollider
Adds Rigidbody components to dynamic objects

evals.prompt: Write a Needle Engine component that makes an object smoothly follow another object's position each frame. The target object is assigned as a field.
evals.expected_output: Uses worldPosition getter/setter directly or getTempVector, not .clone() or new Vector3() in update loop

assertions.text: Does not call .clone() in the update loop
Does not allocate new Vector3() in the update loop
Uses worldPosition setter or getTempVector for position math

evals.prompt: Set up a GitHub Actions workflow to deploy my Needle Engine project on every push to main.
evals.expected_output: Uses needle-tools/deploy-to-needle-cloud-action@v1, not GitHub Pages, not npx needle-cloud deploy in a run step

assertions.text: Does not use 'npx needle-cloud deploy' in a run step
Does not use GitHub Pages deployment
Includes a name parameter for the project
